svg.text: Microsoft Sentinel Data Lake Analysis • 90 Days • SentinelMaster Workspace • March 2026
✅ VS Code (32), Sentinel CLI (11), M365 Security (108) — MFA OK
Protegidos por MFA e Conditional Access
⚠ Protocolo NTLM habilitado — vulnerável a Pass-the-Hash, Relay, Credential Theft
Todas as falhas usaram NTLM | Kerberos não detectado | SMBv1 potencialmente ativo
✅ Controles OK: PBKDF2 100K iter + salt | timingSafeEqual | sanitize() | execAsync+timeout | icacls ACL | contextIsolation
IPC guard wrapper | nodeIntegration:false | adminResetPassword gate | Path-traversal fixed v3.1.0
📋 ORDEM DE EXECUÇÃO DO ATAQUE & MITRE ATT&CK MAPPING
Initial Access — NTLM Brute Force em vm-exposed-lab
Credential Access — Password Spray via Azure AD
Persistence — Se obtiver acesso: schtasks (Scheduled Task)
Lateral Movement — Azure PS/CLI sem MFA (365 logins single-factor)
Defense Evasion — Rate-limit bypass via app restart
Credential Theft — Harvest password de schtasks /rp ou SHA-256 hash
SigninLogs (913 eventos) | DeviceLogonEvents (5.692 eventos) | admin-guard.js (314 linhas) | main.js (777 linhas)
